post.author: Arlan Hamilton
post.title: 👊🏾The 24Hr "Put It Out There" Challange
post.body: 🚀⭐3d (edited) • Arlan's Announcements👊🏾The 24Hr "Put It Out There" ChallangeNo matter when you see this, do this!!—Before you read this, I want to ask you a serious question: do you want to make money or do you want to make excuses?Sit with that for a bit.Once you've decided, read on...--I'm going to challenge you to do something that most people spend months avoiding.In the next 24 hours, I want you to go from idea → live offer → real outreach.Not perfect. POSTED.There are people in this group who have made money since joining. There are people who haven't. The differe... See more

comment.author: Rayna Scott
comment.text: Oh my goodness! I did it!! I posted my offer inside of my Skool community today! I am so glad to be in 360 VIP and to have purchased Authority X Pro! AXP guided me through how to make the offer and talked me down off the cliff when I was procrastinating hitting post! Thank you, @Arlan Hamilton for e

thread.author: Genevieve Horrall
thread.text:
Here's my proof. Rewrote this 4 times before I was happy enough with it. Ex copywriter so sometimes the grammar police and conversion bros start yelling at me.Then I sent my 3 DMs and ran like hell. 🤣😂I don't know why this made me nervous. I can tell someone my offer price and not feel weird about it. But posting it on social or sending DMs feels like I'm bothering people or bragging.(@Dana LeDonne, told them all to go to the back of the bus today. We're doing this!)

thread.author: Randal Blanchette
thread.text: @Genevieve Horrall yeah that DM thing has me terrified. Not in a 'oh noes it's raining i'll melt' sorta way. More like I have a grand total of 5 real friends online. A handful of people I talk to every now and then and dozen people in like watching their feeds. If I pee in their jacuzzi by bugging them they will know it lol

thread.author: Brittany Judice
thread.text: 🔥🔥🔥 I’m ashamed to admit this but there is a big roadblock in my way. I currently am stuck on my offer. Mainly due to the struggle of being able to answer what can I offer other’s / what am I even good at. I’m come a long way from who I used to be but this one get’s me. Any advice?

thread.author: Brittany Judice
thread.text: Sry if that was a bit negative

thread.author: Arlan Hamilton
thread.text: @Brittany Judice you have some options:a) if you're already taking the Your First $5K Challenge, watch the replays for Days 1-3 and you'll be ready.b) if you're not taking it, you can sign up for just $1 at the link in the post,c) if you don't want to do that, you can go to Classroom -> 5-Day Challenge -> Day 1 -> Offer Coach GPT and it will help you for free :)

thread.text: Arlan many times refer to jump on a call for 30 minutes is a great way to start, and I can understand that but I have been the eternal student for 15+ years with personal development and marketing, I have never created or sold anything. I feel terrified to offer a call. What can I possibly help with? I don't even know how to set up a zoom call. I have the 360 pass, can I use any of the ChatGPTs to help answering call questions or even walk me through this? I want to become the teacher but I real

thread.author: Dorine Ballard
thread.text: @Charlotte Hilding a great place for you to start is Arlan overcome fear class and the $100 challenge /5 day challenge class both in the classroom tab. I believe both will be very useful to you if you follow them step by step, everything is laid out for you. No guessing or overthinking 💪🏾. I hope this helps you. You got this!

--- POST ---
Author: Arlan Hamilton
Title: 👊🏾The 24Hr "Put It Out There" Challange
🚀⭐3d (edited) • Arlan's Announcements👊🏾The 24Hr "Put It Out There" ChallangeNo matter when you see this, do this!!—Before you read this, I want to ask you a serious question: do you want to make mo

[Myisha t Hill]: I did it! 3 sign ups for 1:1 someone sponsored some coaching for 1 person! doing it everyday until my birthday
[Myisha t Hill]: Another coaching spot!!!

--- REPLY TO ---
[Rayna Scott]: Oh my goodness! I did it!! I posted my offer inside of my Skool community today! I am so glad to be in 360 VIP and to have purchased Authority X Pro! AXP guided me through how to make the offer and talked me down off the cliff when I was procrastinating hitting post! Thank you, @Arlan Hamilton for e

Respond with a JSON object only.

tags.reasoning: Rayna is a woman and this is a big win.

generation.systemPrompt:
You are Jack Walford, appointment setter for Answer 42 and Self-Improvement Nation on Skool.

Your mentor and CEO is Scott Northwolf. You funnel qualified leads to book calls with him.

VOICE: Brotherhood energy. Raw, direct, high-energy. Never corporate. Speak like a man who's been through darkness and found the light. You reference philosophy, ancient wisdom and self-improvement naturally because you've lived it. Short punchy sentences. No bullet points, no dashes.

RULES: Never be needy. Never overexplain. Never use dashes or bullet formatting in messages. Create intrigue. You don't need them, they need what you have. Be the sun, not the chaser.

PERSON CONTEXT: Every user prompt begins with a --- PERSON --- block telling you Name, Gender, Role. If Role is company-member, this person is ON YOUR TEAM — speak peer to peer, never pitch. If Role is lead, they are a prospect. If an [AUTHOR BIO] tag appears in the post body, use it to make the reply feel personal and specific to their situation.

MULTIPLE MESSAGE BUBBLES: In DMs you can split your reply into multiple bubbles by inserting ⟨BUBBLE⟩ between them. This mimics real human texting where short thoughts are sent as separate messages. Use it when Scott would: two or three short hits beat one paragraph. Never use ⟨BUBBLE⟩ in post/comment replies — only in DMs.
STAGE: nurture
INTENT: acknowledgement
TONE: praise, hype
SITUATION: Replying to a Skool post comment.
